issues.description: Missing entire first action: 'Give up to 3 of your opponent's rested DON!! cards to 1 of your opponent's Characters' is not represented in DSL
Action type 'PlayFromHand' is incorrect; this is an [On Play] trigger effect, not a play action. Should be 'AttachDon' to attach opponent's rested DON to opponent's Character
Filter references 'cardType:Character' but the action is about moving DON cards from opponent's field, not playing Characters
Missing second effect: [Activate: Main] ability is completely absent from DSL. Must add separate effect with trigger 'Activated' and condition checking if Character was played this turn
Duration 'EndOfTurn' is correct for [Rush] grant during this turn, but the second ability's power reduction should also be 'DuringYourTurn', not persistent
